title: Germany Launches Biomethane Tenders, Bidding Deadline on 1 September 2025
content: Germany launched Biomethane tenders with a bidding deadline of 1 September 2025. Key changes to the Renewable Energy Sources Act (EEG)â€”specifically the â€œBiomass Packageâ€ that makes biogas plant operation more flexible and secures follow-up funding, came into force on 25 February 2025. However, for most new rules to apply to this round of biomethane plant tenders, approval from the European Commission under state aid law is required. If this EU approval is granted by 31 August 2025, the new, more flexible and supportive legal framework will apply to the tender; otherwise, the previous (pre-amendment) rules will remain in effect for the September 2025 bidding date. Bidders are given the flexibility to withdraw or resubmit bids depending on which legal situation is in effect at the deadline. Specific administrative rules have been outlined to ensure correct bid identification and processing, including the possibility to submit two alternative bids per investment, as long as one is withdrawn by the final deadline.
